subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-13 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The first duty which humanity is bidden to carry out is to investigate the realities of things. It is incumbent upon the people to seek to unravel every truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول امریکه نفوس بآن مکلفند تحقیق و تحری در حقایق امور است انسان واجب است
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @condition of search, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
